description_long: This helmet is modeled after the iconic Star Wars Stormtrooper design, featuring a robust, rounded shell with a pronounced brow and angular eye slits. The surface is predominantly white with a weathered, dirty appearance, accented by a bold red vertical stripe running from the top to the bottom of the helmet. On the left side of the faceplate, a large red Imperial crest is visible, partially covered by the stripe. Blue vent-like markings are present on the lower sides, and there are small, tally-mark scratches on the upper left side, suggesting battle wear. The helmet has molded details such as cheek filters, ear covers, and a recessed mouth grille, giving it a functional, sci-fi military look.
description: A weathered white Stormtrooper-style helmet with a red vertical stripe, Imperial crest, and blue vent details, showing signs of battle wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red vertical stripe, Imperial crest, black eye slits, and mouth grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the tally-mark scratches, ear cover, and blue vent details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuation of the red stripe and the helmet's rounded back with minimal features.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the ear cover, blue vent details, and the edge of the red stripe and crest.
attribute_brand_logo: A large red Imperial crest emblem is present on the left front side of the helmet, circular with radiating spokes.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Blue rectangular vent-like markings are present on both lower sides of the helmet, arranged in a horizontal row; no actual open vents are visible.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered white base with a bold red vertical stripe, a large red Imperial crest, blue vent details, and tally-mark scratches for a battle-worn, sci-fi military look.
